contract_changes: Added evidence comment to clerkMiddleware section: 24/38 repos (63%) affected

false_positive_check.notes: Scan target was @clerk/nextjs (the underlying package) since @clerk/nextjs-v7 is a directory alias. All violations confirmed real — auth/clerkMiddleware/useUser/currentUser/useSignIn missing try-catch or isLoaded guard patterns verified in top repos.

audits.notes: Scanned 40 repos using @clerk/nextjs; 38 successfully scanned (1 skipped for tsconfig extends, 1 errored). 29/38 repos affected (76%). auth function most violated with 75 violations across 19 repos. Evidence strongly confirms all parent-inherited postconditions. corpus-tier: public
